message: All 3 acceptance criteria verified: grandchild fetching via get_children_batch in routes/proxy.py:247-270, SVG timeline renders nested tool call bars with indentation and color classification in proxy_trace.html:231-281, and expandable detail sections use details/summary toggle in proxy_trace.html:319-358. 1313 tests pass including 4 dedicated grandchild tests.
